meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve no version control (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Workflow: Solving Version Control for AI Apps
content.seo_description: Stop losing client work. Master a professional AI-driven version control workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your freelance business efficiently.
content.answer_block: To eliminate the risk of lost progress, integrate a Git-based versioning layer into your AI build process. By using Antigravity to scaffold structured repositories and Claude Code to automate commit hygiene, you transform chaotic experimentation into a repeatable, professional pipeline that guarantees code integrity and client satisfaction.
content.intro:
You’re three hours into a high-stakes client build, the AI is generating brilliant logic, and suddenly, the context window crashes—taking your unsaved progress into the void. It’s the freelance nightmare: working without a safety net, where one wrong prompt wipes out a day of billable hours. 

But the era of reckless, unversioned coding is over. By adopting an infrastructure-first workflow, you stop treating AI outputs as disposable text and start treating them as mission-critical assets. We are moving from 'playing with LLMs' to 'engineering production-grade software' using a streamlined stack that automates your version control.

steps.title: Initialize Git-Aware Project Environment
steps.description: Before writing code, establish a robust repository structure that allows for atomic commits.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a professional SaaS project structure with a .gitignore tailored for AI-generated assets, a README.md, and a git-ready configuration.
steps.claude_code_command: git init && touch .gitignore && claude init --template saas-pro

steps.title: Automate Commit Hygiene with Claude
steps.description: Don't manually track changes; use Claude to summarize your architectural shifts into meaningful commit messages.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a pre-commit hook script that triggers an AI audit to verify code quality before staging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a concise, conventional commit message for the recent changes in src/'

steps.title: Branching for Client Iterations
steps.description: Never push experimental AI changes to main. Use feature branches to isolate client feedback loops.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a branching strategy script that creates a new environment for every client feature request.

steps.title: Contextual Snapshots
steps.description: Capture the AI's state and logic as a snapshot, ensuring you can revert if a specific prompt iteration introduces regression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a utility to export the current AI context window into a versioned JSON metadata file within the repo.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'save current session state to docs/context-snapshots/v1.json'

steps.title: Deployment Verification
steps.description: Ensure your production build matches your versioned source code before handing off to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CI/CD check that verifies the current git hash matches the deployed environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'verify build integrity against the latest main branch commit'

pro_tips: Always commit before calling a complex LLM chain; treat the LLM as a non-deterministic 'black box' that requires a rollback point.
Use Git submodules for your AI agent libraries to keep your core application logic decoupled from volatile AI dependencies.
Automate your 'git push' triggers using Claude Code to ensure your cloud storage is always 1:1 with your local environment.
Keep a 'prompt-history' directory in your repo to track which specific instructions led to successful code blocks.
Use git tags for every client milestone delivery; it creates a professional audit trail that justifies your hourly rates.
resources: Git Best Practices for Freelancers: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Set up your first Git repository today and run a test commit via Claude Code to verify your pipeline is active.
content.conversion_block: Stop losing time to manual errors and start shipping like a senior engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
